subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Through his honor Hakim-i-Ilahi the letter was received, and its contents were replete with praiseworthy meanings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان به واسطه جناب حکیم الهی نامه رسید مضمون مشحون به معانی محمود بود
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement
